title: Remove references to crio.conf in manpages and unused CRI-O test configs
body:
We no longer use crio.conf so referencing it in manpages is just confusing. Also, swap a few docker-login references for podman-login

Also removes unused configs from the CRI-O E2E tests that were leftover from repo import.
